title: Learning from Home
passage:
Learning from Home

Online learning is very popular today. Many students do not go to a school building. Instead, they study at home using a computer and the internet. This is also called distance education.

Sarah is a fifteen-year-old student from Canada. She is an online student. Every morning, Sarah wakes up at 8:00 AM. She does not need to catch a school bus. She eats breakfast with her family. Then, she goes to her bedroom and turns on her laptop computer. Her online school starts at 9:00 AM. She sits at her small desk near the window.

Sarah has four classes every day. She studies English, Mathematics, Science, and History. She can see her teacher on her computer screen. The teacher talks and shows pictures. Sarah can type questions to her teacher. She can also talk to other students in a chat room. Sarah likes her online classes because she can learn at her own speed. If she does not understand a lesson, she can watch the video again.

However, online learning has some problems. Sometimes, the internet connection is bad. When the internet stops, Sarah cannot see her teacher or do her work. Another problem is that Sarah misses her friends. She cannot play with them during break times. She only sees them on the computer screen. She feels a bit lonely during the week.

To help with this, Sarah joins a local sports club. She plays football every Saturday afternoon. This helps her make new friends and stay active. Her parents also help her. Every evening, they take a walk in the park together. Sarah thinks online learning is great, but she must also spend time outside.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Sarah is a fifteen-year-old student from Canada.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What time does Sarah's online school start?
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Her online school starts at 9:00 AM.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why does Sarah like her online classes?

options.A: Because she can learn at her own speed
options.B: Because she does not have any homework
options.C: Because she can sleep late every day
options.D: Because her parents teach her lessons

questions.explanation: The text states: 'Sarah likes her online classes because she can learn at her own speed.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the Reading Passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Sarah has five classes every day.

options.TRUE: The statement agrees with the information
options.NOT GIVEN: There is no information on this

questions.explanation: The text states: 'Sarah has four classes every day.' Therefore, the statement is False.

questions.explanation: The text states: 'When the internet stops, Sarah cannot see her teacher or do her work.'

questions.text: Every evening, Sarah walks in the park with her _______.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'Her parents also help her. Every evening, they take a walk in the park together.'

vocabulary.meaning: hệ thống giáo dục từ xa (học trực tuyến không cần đến trường)
tốc độ riêng của bản thân (không phụ thuộc vào người khác)

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài Reading trình độ A1-A2

1. Định vị từ khóa (Scanning): Ở trình độ này, các câu hỏi sử dụng từ vựng giống hệt hoặc cực kỳ sát với bài đọc. Hãy tìm các từ khóa nổi bật như tên riêng (Sarah, Canada), số giờ (8:00 AM, 9:00 AM), thứ trong tuần (Saturday) để tìm ra đoạn văn chứa đáp án nhanh nhất.

2. Kỹ thuật làm bài True/False/Not Given: Nếu thông tin trong câu hỏi hoàn toàn ngược lại với bài đọc, chọn FALSE. Nếu thông tin không hề được đề cập (ví dụ: môn học yêu thích), chọn NOT GIVEN. Đừng tự suy luận ngoài đời thực.

3. Giới hạn từ (Word limit): Luôn chú ý yêu cầu đề bài (ví dụ: 'NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS'). Đáp án điền vào chỗ trống phải là từ xuất hiện trực tiếp trong bài khóa, không tự ý thay đổi dạng của từ.
